positive: Minimalist, geometric illustration of a friendly, ethereal woodland creature (e.g., a stylized fox or bunny) nestled among stylized flora. The design should feature a deep teal and ochre palette with stark black accents, providing high contrast for apparel printing. The composition is central and framed for a t-shirt chest print. Include abstract, repeating pattern elements (like delicate leaves, crescent moons, or dots) that can be separated for modular design. Style should be a modern, clean vector illustration with slight grain texture for depth, reminiscent of sophisticated Scandinavian design or engraved line art. Flat, solid colors with defined outlines, suitable for single-color screen printing or crisp digital printing. Excellent visibility and high detail.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, watermark, text, logos, signature, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, poor quality, messy, realistic photo, low detail, jpeg artifacts
